reviews.comment:
Muy buena la atención de todos los empleados y mucha variedad de comida. Lo único que para las tardes horas de la noche no tienen comida rápida disponible.

(Translated by Google)
The staff were very attentive and there was a great variety of food. The only downside was that they don't have fast food available in the late afternoon or evening.
